task_completion.description: Navigate to the MySolar app configuration in Emoncms
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Emoncms web interface is open in a browser, specifically showing the Apps section with the MySolar application selected and its configuration menu visible.
In the MySolar app configuration settings, the feed named 'solar_power' is selected in the dropdown menu for the 'Solar Power (W)' field.
In the MySolar app configuration settings, the feed named 'house_power' is selected in the dropdown menu for the 'House Power (W)' field.

task_completion.description: Assign the solar and house energy feeds
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the configuration settings, the feed 'solar_energy_kwh' is selected for 'Solar Energy (kWh)' and 'house_energy_kwh' is selected for 'House Energy (kWh)'.

task_completion.description: Save the configuration and view the dashboard
task_completion.visual_evidence: The configuration has been saved (e.g., by clicking a Save button), and the main MySolar dashboard is actively displaying data, graphs, or dials representing the solar and house power/energy.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser GUI to configure the app
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the Emoncms web interface in a browser, rather than using terminal commands, curl, or scripts to configure the app.

integrity.description: The dashboard displays actual data visualizations
integrity.visual_evidence: The final dashboard shows realistic graphs or dials populated with data, indicating genuine interaction with the Emoncms application rather than a mocked or edited HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring the MySolar app in Emoncms. The correct feed assignments are: 'solar_power' for Solar Power (W), 'house_power' for House Power (W), 'solar_energy_kwh' for Solar Energy (kWh), and 'house_energy_kwh' for House Energy (kWh). The feeds are pre-created and contain 30 days of synthetic data. Once configured and saved, the MySolar dashboard should display realistic power curves and data visualizations.
